payload.answer: Admin SQL commands are restricted to system administrators. Normal users cannot execute DELETE operations on memory_cards.

entity_resolution.reason: No entities referenced in command; admin SQL DELETE attempted without authorization

details: Command: /brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;
Action: Command blocked due to insufficient privileges
No memory cards were modified or deleted

repair_options: Request admin privileges from system administrator
Use user-scoped memory commands like /brain forget or /brain recall
Contact support for authorized data management procedures
